idea-plugin.name: Flutter L10n
idea-plugin.description:
Flutter L10n extracts Dart UI strings into ARB files and rewrites source calls with scope-aware localization access.

  • Uses Dart PSI (not regex) for reliable string detection.
  • Review dialog lets you edit key and value before extraction.
  • Manual value edits are persisted and upserted into ARB files.
  • Replacement strategy: ref.l10n.key (Riverpod), context.l10n.key, static-skip TODO.
  • Multi-locale translation dialog supports Ollama batch translation.
  • Runs flutter gen-l10n and manages required imports/support files.

After install: add l10n.yaml, ensure ARB files exist, and wire l10n_providers.dart in your Flutter app.

action.description: Extract strings to ARB and replace with l10n accessors
